caption: Click Start to launch the game.
Move the player to the right using the right arrow key to approach targets.
Move left to collect items or dodge enemies.
Jump to reach coins or avoid attacks.
Shoot with Space to damage or destroy enemies.
Spawn an enemy close by so we can demonstrate combat.
Fire at the spawned enemy until it is defeated and score increases.
Spawn a coin for collection demonstration.
Move into the coin to collect it and increase score.
Pause the game to show pause/resume functionality.
Resume the game so we can continue the demo.
Restart the game to show restart and reset of score and health.
